mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_referral (inviter_id, invitee_id, referral_code, status, signup_bonus_given, sub_bonus_given, created_at) VALUES (#{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, #{referralCode}, #{status}, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.inviter_id, r.invitee_id, r.referral_code, r.status, r.signup_bonus_given, r.sub_bonus_given, r.created_at, m.nickname AS inviter_nickname, m.profile_img AS inviter_profile_img FROM sm_referral r JOIN member m ON m.member_id = r.inviter_id WHERE r.referral_code = #{referralCode} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.id, r.inviter_id, r.invitee_id, r.referral_code, r.status, r.signup_bonus_given, r.sub_bonus_given, r.created_at FROM sm_referral r WHERE r.invitee_id = #{inviteeId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_invited, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN signup_bonus_given = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signup_bonus_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sub_bonus_given = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sub_bonus_count FROM sm_referral WHERE inviter_id = #{inviterId}

SELECT r.id, r.invitee_id, r.referral_code, r.status, r.signup_bonus_given, r.sub_bonus_given, r.created_at, m.nickname AS invitee_nickname, m.profile_img AS invitee_profile_img FROM sm_referral r JOIN member m ON m.member_id = r.invitee_id WHERE r.inviter_id = #{inviterId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
